user.title: Dartford Bin Collections
user.description:
Enter your property details to fetch bin collection dates from Dartford Borough Council.

Find your UPRN at https://www.findmyaddress.co.uk/

data_description.refresh_interval: How often to check the council website for updated dates

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Dartford Borough Council portal.

error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs.
